property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files

pm;C:\Users\2479309\AppData\Roaming
pm;.

testcase.name: TC_SEARCH_02_searchForKnownTermShowsResults

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Searching for 'admin' should display a results dropdown with at least one matching item expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Searching for 'admin' should display a results dropdown with at least one matching item expected [true] but found [false] at
